creator: stolz@i2.informatik.rwth-aachen.de
text:
Building guile-1.4 yields:

PATH=.:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/games:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/X11R6/bin:/root/bin ./guile-doc-snarf eval.c -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I.. -I./.. -I../libltdl  -O -pipe -Wall -Wmissing-prototypes eval.c > eval.x  || { rm eval.x; false; }
gawk: ./guile-snarf.awk:17: (FILENAME=- FNR=11273) fatal error: internal error
Abort trap - core dumped
*** Error code 1

Stop in /opt/ports/lang/guile/work/guile-1.4/libguile.

gawk version is 3.0.6.

Fix: 

Several solutions:

1) Installing mawk. Guile´s configure-script will prefer it over gawk.
The check for gawk should probably removed in configure

2) Add the following lines to the ports´ Makefile:
GNU_CONFIGURE=  yes
CONFIGURE_ENV=  AWK=awk
How-To-Repeat: Install gawk,
cd /usr/ports/lang/guile && make
